label: Request Approval
description: Create an approval request and pause this scenario until a human approves or rejects. Use the callback URL from a Make webhook to resume your scenario after the decision.

parameters.name: title
parameters.label: What needs approval?
parameters.help: A short description of what you want approved (e.g. 'Send invoice #1234 to client'). If left blank, you can edit the title in your Gatekeeper dashboard at gkapprove.com.

parameters.name: description
parameters.label: Details
parameters.help: Additional context for the reviewer (optional). Use dynamic data from previous modules.

parameters.name: callback_url
parameters.label: Callback URL
parameters.help: To receive the approval decision: 1) Create a second scenario with the Gatekeeper 'Approval Decision Received' trigger. 2) Copy the webhook URL it generates. 3) Paste it here. When someone approves or rejects, Gatekeeper will POST the decision to that URL and your second scenario will continue automatically.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.label: Metadata (JSON)
parameters.help: Optional JSON data to attach (e.g. {"order_id": "123"}). Routing rules, priority, expiration, and approvers are all configured in your Gatekeeper dashboard at gkapprove.com.
